_comment: Story-format slideshow for CheckVibe. 7 slides: title (Higgsfield) + 6 caption-over-photo beats ending on the checkvibe.dev logo slide. Each beat has several phrasings so every run varies a bit while keeping the same narrative and vibe. Backgrounds for beats 1-5 are pulled from pinterest_final (same pool the other slideshows use). Slide 0 is the shared Higgsfield title_slide.png.
